# Ship

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Ship;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Ship { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
boat, knots, nautical mile, maritime, sailing, yacht, cruise, ocean liner, tanker, vessel, navy, trip, releases

## Categories
transportation, navigation, travel

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/ship)
